summary: Improved the visible OpenClaw Work Scoring Helper preview with section-aware default rubric presets.
validation: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('previews/work-scoring-helper/index.html','utf8'); const checks=['sectionPresets','findPreset','applyPreset','presetHint']; for (const c of checks) if(!html.includes(c)) throw new Error('missing '+c); console.log('static-check-ok')"
nextIdeas: Let users toggle between raw manual scoring and preset-assisted scoring.
Add duplicate detection and merge behavior for imported saved ideas.
Add direct import from cycle JSON records alongside backlog markdown.
